body.u: When I left school I took up aprentishipapprenticeship as a fitter and {turner?} this mentmeant traveling from sheppeySheppey to Rochester every day but this didn’t bother me to much as I had already a mopeadmoped and the next year I learned to drive a car so this didn’t realyreallyeffectaffect me. So I stayed to become a skilled man.

In the evening I had already a small disco when I left school, but as the years progresed I built the disco up and became quite good. Then when my aprenteshipapprenticeship had finished I had to make some kind of disisiondecision to what I was going to do so in the end I sold all of my disco and put the money into a small business using the skill I had already learned from my aprentishipapprenticeship to become quite a good little engineering shop.

I also had my girl friend who from the age of sixteen was beginning to take up lots of time and get involved in what I was doing so the shop I brought I had to make shuresure had a flat above so marriage could follow with out to much trouble which it did at the age of 23.
